summary:
ASSASSINATION THREATS AND BOUNTIES: Brandon shares a vision from October 19th detailing a hit list targeting high-profile political and media figures, including Donald Trump, Don Jr., Alex Jones, and Tucker Carlson. Brandon describes seeing bounties averaging $50,000 and reaching over half a million dollars, funded by a specific entity and written in red ink like a wanted poster. Brandon states that God promised divine protection for Alex Jones, who will serve a role similar to John the Baptist. Brandon also mentions seeing MS-13 members and underground communities using SIM card devices to coordinate these threats.

INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS AND DEMONIC VISIONS: Brandon discusses geopolitical escalations, specifically citing long-range, red-tipped missiles, which he identifies as Tomahawks or British Storm Shadows, being launched from Ukraine into Russia. Brandon recounts visions of Polish soldiers in snow gear and military activities in Romania. Brandon describes seeing satanic rituals in Berlin, Germany, involving human sacrifices and a dark rock to summon an Antichrist Hitler spirit, explicitly clarifying the object is not the Spear of Destiny. Brandon links these demonic portals to CERN and upcoming Olympic events, mentioning Pope Leo and the date February 3, 2026. Brandon states that demonic entities, including Apollyon, are standing at attention worldwide because they sense the imminent return of Jesus Christ.

FINANCIAL SHIFTS AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon relates a vision of blacked-out power poles connected to four major financial doors waiting for a switch to be flipped to restore power. Brandon connects this imagery to public comments made by Brad Garlinghouse about flipping a switch, stating this aligns with an impending transfer of wealth for believers.

HEAVENLY SIGNS AND THE ORAL ROBERTS VISION: Brandon references a 2004 prophecy by Oral Roberts regarding a massive, sky-obscuring sign of smoke, vapor, and blood appearing over New York and spreading across America. Brandon connects this to his own vision of a glowing, traveling rock. Brandon asserts this upcoming event will produce an unprecedented, physically penetrating sound and act as an undeniable sign of the second coming of Jesus Christ meant to awaken both the church and unbelievers.

CIVIL UNREST AND URBAN CRISES: Brandon warns of severe domestic instability, including a total power grid failure in New York City requiring external generators. Brandon describes visions of mass migrations out of the city, violent riots involving paid demonstrators in solid black tactical gear, Molotov cocktails, and police using riot shields and fire hoses. Brandon states that the expansion of ICE will trigger further organized uprisings and protests in major cities like Chicago, Boston, Philadelphia, Seattle, Houston, and Miami, funded by foreign cartels and coordinated with underground gang networks like MS-13.

DOMESTIC SECURITY AND TERROR THREATS: Brandon issues urgent warnings for holiday travel security during Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year's, specifically highlighting vulnerabilities in the TSA, mass transit, and the Rockefeller tree lighting. Brandon describes a vision of a specific black carry-on bag containing camouflaged, dangerous materials. Brandon additionally details a planned kamikaze-style vehicular attack in Honolulu, Hawaii, orchestrated by a man wearing a flower necklace as an act of jihad and a geopolitical flex. Brandon urges continuous prayer for the protection of Mar-a-Lago, the Trump family, JD Vance, the Supreme Court, and various law enforcement agencies against these coordinated infiltrations.
rawData: [November 04, 2025]-[Praying over something like 3i Atlas]-[https://youtu.be/vxOD_LJfF1Q]-[Well, good evening family, or good morning wherever you are. I have some things on my heart to pray over tonight. We crawl—we're in the middle of the forest. Did you not see the deer behind us? You're on the green screen. Hey, somebody sent this to me, by the way—a dog, squirrel. It's the squirrel. Remember I said 'squirrel'? And it's always when I get distracted and I see the squirrel. This is the dog that I was talking about. Squirrel! 'If you threw a stick, I would chase it for you.' And I thought it was cute. They sent me a toy. I thought—I told Guy, I said, 'People are so funny.' I laughed and laughed and laughed because that's my dog. 'I have just met you and I love you.' And they sent that to me for being funny, I guess on an important mission for the small because I get distracted and I say 'squirrel.' But I thought that was fun that people are being nice. Okay, the hit list is real. And this is so important that you all know when we're praying into this and we're praying over our leaders and our nation. Alex Jones has had some kind of intel. Is this the video? Yeah, yes, that's important. That's why—that's what I wanted to show. You wanted one of him in it? Yes, sir. He reacts to it. Yeah. This is what I wanted you to see right here. Now, I won't be able to keep this up because YouTube does not like this man, but I want you to hear it while we're praying. I've got a thousand some odd people. I'll be able to leave it up for a couple of hours, but I'm going to have to take it down. That's probably way too much. But this is what I'm trying to tell you. Even the price—I saw $50,000. Does anybody remember that on October 19th, I was caught up in the spirit and the Lord showed me a list of names and I saw four entities being paid major money? I'm talking—this was funded well by somebody in particular; it was big. But as I was praying, I saw MS13. I saw underground towns. I saw a little community, is what I would call it, communicating on these SIM card devices. And the Lord said to us, 'You must pray. You must pray and protect your leaders.' Don Jr. is a target. Alex Jones, Tucker Carlson, President Trump, and the list goes on and on. But as I was seeing, the higher and more powerful the authority of the individual, the greater the bounty. I saw some of them going over half a million dollars for some of them. Like some of them, the average was 50,000, but it was on a list and I saw the list. It was like a 'wanted dead or alive'—you know what I'm talking about?—like the cowboys. It was in red writing and the Lord showed this to us and he said, 'Pray over Bondi and pray over...' and then he said, 'I will protect Alex Jones. He will uncover some things and I will protect him and his life will be spared and he will become very vocal like a John the Baptist, even more than what he already is in the end for this end-time army. And I will use Alex Jones. He will have an experience like a road to Damascus type of experience.' And the Lord warned us and told us about this. And Alex was more upfront in this than even Tucker Carlson. Tucker Carlson is more fade-away in the background. But the main one that I really feel to pray over is even more Don Jr. I told you it was a list against President Trump's immediate family—to pray for his children and his grandchildren and his wife and him. It was just a list to pray for his family because I saw them trying to come at him to make him so distracted that he doesn't want to pursue or go on anymore because it would make him want to—because of touching his family—shrink back and clam up, to stop him from proceeding and going on because he didn't want any more of his kids to get hurt, so that it would be a very, very sad time for him. And I saw that grieving hitting him because of losing his son. So we pray for these people. I didn't realize they were in bunkers; something major is happening. I told you we have a Red Dawn experience in our nation coming. The enemy within. The enemy within. The Lord said, 'You have an enemy within that came over over the last, over the Biden, Sleepy Joe's administration, deliberately allowing these people in our nation.' And the Lord warned us and told us, 'You must pray now. This is very serious.' And I said, 'It's not a call to fear; it's a call to prayer.' And everything that I'm telling you, I really truly believe as we see it, we're seeing it in the news. It's not something just I'm over here flipping, making stuff up. It's happening now. It's happening. What the Lord has warned us about is happening in the news. We saw it weeks prior, over two weeks. So I thought it was interesting. Even the Tomahawk missiles. The Lord talking to me. He's still talking to me about these missiles. Long-range missiles from Ukraine going into Moscow, poking the bear for an acceleration of war. Then Braden brought it to my attention today. The United Kingdom said, 'We will give you these red-tipped missiles.' And because I said they're red. They have red at the tip of these missiles. They have red—there's painted red on these missiles. And I said it's like Tomahawks. Well, the United Kingdom today said, 'We will give you these red missiles.' It's from the British, from England. Yes. Do you see it right here? Britain has supplied Ukraine with another shipment of Storm Shadow missiles, equipping Kyiv for long-range strikes into Russia this winter. For long-range strikes into Russia this winter. So this is what I'm talking about—what I saw. Do you see these? These are red-tipped missiles. What I said, they're red tips. Well, I still believe they're Tomahawks. But this goes along with what I saw: long-range strikes into the winter. Well, what did I tell you Poland was wearing? I said they're wearing snow gear. They had these little Fudd-looking hats on covering their ears and they were running with guns—with AR-15s, you know, like assault-style, and they were running towards something and it was snow on the ground. But this is when I saw Romania and these other nations that would be involved. Then last night I saw four horsemen of Apocalypse when I was praying and I saw Germany and Berlin. I saw them making human sacrifices with these virgin girls, trafficking, trying to summon up that Hitler spirit, the Antichrist Hitler spirit. They were doing satanic rituals. And when I saw this, I saw the thing that they were using—and I'm not going to get into it because it was very dark. What I saw was very satanic. But as I saw this, the Lord said, 'Watch the Olympics, the opening ceremony.' There's more to this. And then he said, 'Why do they pick the spots they pick?' There's more to this. Why is CERN built in that area? There are portals. There are things in the spirit concerning the demonic, concerning this summoning up war, summoning up to bring forth the Mahdi. And then that was what the Lord was showing us last night. And then I saw the Vatican and the Lord said, 'Watch Pope Leo concerning the Olympics. Watch this time frame going in the next 3 months on February the 3rd of 2026. That's when the Olympics starts. So we have a window here because today is the third, three months, which is so amazing that the Lord would start talking about it last night, wouldn't it? The time frame of praying into this and showing us that this is an acceleration of end-times events because then I saw the demonic spirits all at attention, and this was in the great Apollyon, that demonic devil that comes up out of the pit and creates war upon the earth and all that. He was spinning. He was spinning and going around Europe, and all of a sudden he came to a standstill and started looking. He knew there was something different. All the devils in hell know—all the demonic principalities—all of them know that Jesus Christ is coming. And they were standing at attention, looking at this bright light. I saw them in the castles in Romania. I could see them in all the places where they've been hanging out in these castles—you know, these demonic spirits. You call them haunting, but they're not haunting; it's just demonic stuff. And they were all at attention, looking at the glory. They knew. Then I said, "Lord, what am I seeing?" He said, "Every knee will bow and every tongue will confess that I am Lord." And I saw at that time what they were all looking at was the coming of our King. They knew. They know. And that's when the Lord used the scripture. He said that Satan knows his time is short. You read that scripture again, Love: Revelation. "Therefore rejoice, ye heavens, and ye that dwell in them. Woe to the inhabiters of the earth and of the sea! For the devil is come down unto you, having great wrath, because he knoweth that he hath but a short time." That's it. Praise God. It's amazing, babe. We are right there in this timeframe, y'all. He knows his time is short, just like what you're reading. Revelation, it's time to get excited about our King coming, folks. It's time to have anticipation and knowing that Jesus is coming. And even the devils in hell know that their time is short. The devil himself knows his time is short. And that's what they were looking at. That Apollyon was looking. He knew. He knows. They all know. And the Lord—I thought it was interesting that the Lord said it. He's pinpointing what they're trying to do to summon up evil by CERN, by sacrifice, by satanic things, trying to summon up things. And people said, "Brandon, what you saw—what they were using—was it the spear? What was it called?" They emailed us and said, "Is it the spear that Hitler tried to get? He got a hold of it and they brought it back to Austria. It was a spear, and it was some kind of thing they said pierced the Lord's side." No, this was not what I was looking at in the spirit. This was some kind of black rock. "The Spear of Destiny." I wasn't looking at it; it wasn't the Spear of Destiny they were using. That's probably in a museum somewhere. I don't think they're going to let them use that for satanic sacrifice. But I don't know—who knows with these people? But I didn't see that. I saw it was some kind of rock, some kind of demonic-looking stone. You know, folks, I don't focus on the devil. I don't focus on what he's doing. Who cares? He's a loser. This is almost over. We're wrapping this thing up. Jesus Christ is coming. But I want you to have your eyes more open. It's time for the church to wake up. If they and the demonic are at that kind of attention, how much more should you be alert? How much more should you be watching for the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ? If the devils in hell know there's something different as of the 23rd of September, from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, things are starting to accelerate. The Lord said to me, "Brandon, this is the point of no return." Why? Where are we at with the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ? He said, "Watch this. The birthing pains will be at the point of no return. You're at the waterfall edge. Jesus is coming." Do you understand, ladies and gentlemen? I tell you this every single time to tell you it's time for you to wake up. The ark is closing. Things are accelerating. Even the devils in hell—it even says in Revelation that even Satan knows that his time is short. And the Lord was showing us that last night, that scripture in a vision, showing me that they knew. They could see the glory. They could see Him coming. It's happening in the realm of the spirit. The light—the Lord said there's a shift. Do you not see it? They know it's not status quo. Things are different in the spirit realm. And out of all these thousands of years, they know; they can see it; they can sense it. They can sense it. Something is about to happen. And all I know is that I'm looking for it. My eyes are to the skies. I'm looking for my Jesus. And I know that it may be three years; it may be tomorrow. I don't know. All I know in my spirit is I believe we have a major revival. I believe we're going to see a major harvest of souls. We're going to see the blind eyes open, the deaf ears open. We're going to see limbs grow back. That's what I believe we're going to see. Now, if we go home tomorrow, then praise God. I'm not going to complain and go, "Lord, why'd you come back? I thought we were going to do..." We're just excited that Jesus is coming. But I know in my spirit that we have a little work to do, and we're going to bring in this harvest. And the enemy knows, and he's doing everything he can to get people distracted and get you preoccupied with life, preoccupied with fear, preoccupied with worry—whatever he can do to keep your eyes off of Him. And I want you to get really radical about Jesus and what He's about to do. He said, "It's all hands on deck." He said, "It's all hands on deck." And I'll keep saying that over and over again. And people said, "Hey, did you see Brad Garlinghouse with his...?" You don't have to play it. He said about the flip of the switch. It was exactly what it kind of went along with. It's not financial advice. I don't know. I'm just telling you what people are bringing to us about the flipping of the switch. And I saw the power poles last night. I told you I saw power cords going to these doors, and they were dark and blacked out, and they just needed the power to go to them and flip the switch. There is a blockage, and the Lord said pray into those doors. There are four major financial doors—four major financial doors that they're going to get power to, and it'll be the flipping of a switch. He said, "Pray into that." So, I see these doors. I see what the Lord is saying to me. And I see there are certain investments, certain things that the Lord is going to do to bring forth the wealth transfer that we're all believing for. And then that man brings up the switch. Not saying he's the avenue, not saying it because I'm not a financial adviser, but I'm trying to say it's just interesting his verbiage. I thought his verbiage was kind of interesting. You know, he's talking about flipping a switch. I was like, "Wow, let's turn this sucker on." I was like, "Let's do it. Let's do it." To me personally, I'm just believing God for my own family. You know, it's a kind of exciting verbiage. I watch people and I go, "Is that a cue? Is that a clue? Do you want me to pray into it?" I don't want to always assume anything. And I don't want people to get on spiritual weirdness. You can go, "Oh, it's this; it's that." Stay grounded. Don't get weird. Don't get spiritually flaky and get all in the clouds and be strange. Stay in the Word. The Word of God keeps you grounded. Stay in the Word; it keeps you grounded, baby. Don't get off in weirdness. There's a lot of spiritual charismatic flakiness, and I don't want to be a part of it. I've seen it. There is spirit and there is Word, and if there's too much spirit, you blow up. If you have too much word, you blow up. If you don't have enough spirit, you dry up. You've got to have the word and the spirit. I hope I did that right, but you've got to have a balance. It's an equilibrium: making sure that you stay grounded, you have the word, you have the spirit, and you keep things flowing. I talked too much; Braden told me 25 minutes. All right, so we're going to pray and seek the Lord together and see what He has for all of you that are not night owls like us. I know you go to sleep early. I told the Lord, "Man, this is when it gets good." The spirit realm—I've learned from 2:00 to around 4:00 in the morning is prime time. It's amazing. Any other time of the day is good, but there is a Holy Ghost flow at night. I was watching somebody special; they were talking about why in the old days they would have two times of sleep. They would sleep from 6:00 at night to about 11:00, wake up, have another little meal, pray until they call it the second watch or something. I was watching it and I was like, "Get out of here!" They would have the candles and they would pray, and they said this was how culture was back then. They would have a little meal and they would put the firewood on the fireplace and stay up from 11:00 to about 2:00 or 3:00 and then they would go back to bed. I thought they knew something. It was some people in the Dark Ages. I was just like, you know, when we got modern electricity, we don't do stuff like that anymore because we have lights. But I thought, isn't that an interesting culture? Here I go talking again. Squirrel! Father, I just thank You for the body. I thank You, Father, for all that You've done and all that You've yet to do. We'll pray and we'll seek You. Father, whatever You have for us, I'm so thankful. I'm so grateful that we can spend time with You. We seek You, Lord, and we'll find You. We'll knock and the door will be opened unto us. Father, I thank You, Lord, for Your body that was broken for us and that we are healed by Your stripes. We don't have to have sickness in our body anymore, Lord, because Galatians says that Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. We take this body in the name of Jesus, and we give You all the glory, honor, and praise for all that You've already done. We're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost healed and whole and well by Your blood, by the wounds on Your back. Thank You, Father, in Jesus' name. Lord, we take the blood and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. Father, I thank You for the blood right now. I cover my wife, my children, our finances, our house, and our car—everything, Father, everything You bless us with. Father, we plead the blood of Jesus over us. I thank You that we're always in the right place at the right time. We apply the blood over our sins, our minds, our wills, and our emotions. We thank You, Father, that we are prosperous in every way possible: spirit, soul, and body. Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health, even as your soul prospers. We believe, Father, that we walk in that divine blessing. As He is, so are we in this world, Lord. We take this right now in the mighty name of Jesus. We thank You, Father, for this is the meal that heals. You're a good God, and You love us so much and You've provided so much for us in Jesus' name. Amen. See how it's different even than last time? I tried to tell Dina, we aren't religious up in here; we're just relationship. I just want Him to come and visit me. I look for Him every day, and I find Him. Even today, when we were out there in the garage cleaning and doing things, He started speaking about the end times to us, having impartation with His love and His fellowship, talking about end-time stuff, the healings, and the manifestations of the glory. I cherish those moments, don't you? Nothing else matters to me. I thought if you had to start over, you'd do the same thing: seek Him. Everything else He always provides. He always takes care of His people. If you're doing right and you're sowing into good ground and you're doing the word and apply the word and do what the word says to do, you'll lack no good thing. Everything else falls in place. It's when you get off in left field and you think you're on the right road and you keep doing the same thing expecting different results. I learned if you don't see results within six months to a quarter of a year, stop doing it. Apply pressure somewhere else; practice, and you'll start to see a change. A cruise ship takes a while to change course because it's such a big boat, but you instantaneously start to see it change. Even if you don't see the full manifestation of a turnaround, you still see change. You can feel it in the spirit. We're on the right road. You have an inward knowing. Be sensitive to what the Spirit of God is telling you to do. Even if you get off track, He said—I'm trying to find the right scripture—'You're not big enough to mess your life up.' He said, "No, you're not big enough to mess your life up, Braden," because the footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord. As long as you're upright and in right standing with Me, if you're seeking Me, the footsteps of the righteous are ordered of the Lord regardless. You can't mess your life up even if you tried. I mean, you can be stupid, but you can turn it around. That was all about Megan when I said, "Man, what are we ever going to do? How are we ever going to fix this?" I said, "Lord, I'm seeking You, and You're going to turn what the devil meant for bad around for good." I just believe that's where we are in these end times. Pray. Yep. I'm so full, baby. It's like poking a sponge; I'm going to dump. It's what happens every time. I go because I'm full. I stay full. Father, we just thank You. We praise You and we lift up this time of prayer. Whatever You want us to do, we'll do it. However You want us to pray, we'll pray. We open the eyes of our heart, Lord. We seek You and we find You. We'll knock and the door will be opened unto us. Father, there are so many things going on right now in the world, but I'm just going to follow Your Spirit. You lead, I follow. You lead, I follow. And Father, we just worship you. Oh Lord, you're beautiful. Your face is all I seek. And when your eyes are on this child, your grace abounds to me. Oh Lord, you're beautiful. Your face is all I seek. I'm seeing something. Isn't that amazing? All right, cool. It starts to shift the atmosphere. It's worship. It's worship in the presence of Jehovah God Almighty, Prince of Peace. Troubles vanish, hearts are mended in the presence of the king. In the presence of Jehovah, God Almighty, Prince of Peace. I see three I-Atlas. It's glowing. I don't know why I'm seeing this rock. It's traveling, but it's gotten brighter than the visions I've seen before. Why are so many focused on this? What is it about this? Something is coming. That's what I heard. 'Something is coming, son. Something is coming.' And this is not an alien. There's no such thing as aliens. It's demonic spirits. But what you're about to see is what Oral Roberts saw in 2004, called the wakeup call. For it will be a wake up to the church, a wake up to the world, a sign of the second coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. It's time for preachers to preach fire back in the pulpits, to preach repentance back in the pulpits. For there will be a sign in the heavens. There will be a sign throughout the earth daily. Remember this word over 20 years ago. He saw it. Timing was not right. You know, whenever you're seeing over in the spirit, it looks like it's right in front of your face. That's what the Lord said—that things look like they're right in front of your face, but you're looking in decades. But there's something coming. And most of the government knows that it's coming, and it's not conspiracy. No, it's not. But that's what the Spirit of the Lord just said. He said, 'This is not conspiracy. It's a sign of the second coming of the Lord Jesus Christ.' It's awakening the world. You have that clip of Oral Roberts? It was a short. It's on the Word Channel. You can play it. This is it. Yep, that's it. Just play it. I feel the Holy Ghost so strong. It's welling in my belly. Then I saw with my eyes something I'd never seen. Suddenly in the clouds in the skies above New York City and the east part of the United States—which hung there for quite some time and then spread out across America without touching the ground—and then God diffused it away from America and sent it out to the nations of the earth. And I saw and I heard. I saw something coming down from above. Smoke and vapor and blood. Or it looked like that to my spiritual eyes. There it was hanging so huge until it almost blotted out the sky. Instantly I thought about 9/11 when the terrorists attacked the Twin Towers. First I saw this thing hovering and great changes coming in it to where I couldn't miss it. And then I heard something. It reminded me of what a friend of mine had said when the first space capsule was released into the sky. He was a newsman in New York City. They told them to be a half mile or more away from the capsule. And he said when that thing lifted off the earth, there was a sound, and the sound itself moved the weeds and the growth. He said it penetrated my body. As I talked to others, they felt the same thing. He said the sound was so enormous that nothing had ever happened like it in the history of the world. Instantly I thought of that because the sound that was coming into my ears was penetrating my whole being. And then I heard God's voice. He said, 'I'm making a sign.' This is a sign according to the second chapter of Acts where the Apostle Peter, upon the giving of the Holy Spirit, the baptism of the Holy Spirit, said, 'There'll be signs in the skies.' He said, 'This is one of the signs of the end time because the world is not ready for the second coming of my son.' They are coming to church on Sunday morning mostly for themselves. And the preachers, for the most part, are not really concerned about the nations of the earth. They're concerned about the little group that is there, and they sing their songs and they get up and preach. When 9/11 struck, there was a fear that came into the hearts even of my people, of the church and of people outside the church, and millions the following Sunday rushed to go to church. But the preachers were not prepared, and most of them didn't even preach on it and didn't even talk about it being the sign of something that's coming hundreds of thousands of times bigger. He said when those planes of the terrorists struck the Twin Towers in New York City and they gradually came tumbling down, it was something bigger than people had ever seen, but it's nothing in comparison to what's going to happen in the second coming of my son. And so he said, 'My church was not prepared to deal with that.' And people came to church and then nothing much happened, and they dropped back, and many of them went back to their bars. There's a sign coming. We're going to pray into that now. It's heavy in my stomach and it's burning like fire. A sign for the unbeliever is coming. It's time to get on the boat. I've warned and warned and warned. Within a 24-hour period, everything would change. Everything is going to change. And within a 24-hour period, the way you live life, everything is going to change. Where there'll be signs in the heavens, there'll be signs in the earth. There'll be signs in your politics. There'll be signs in your finances. And there'll be signs in your church. This is the beginning of sorrows. He's talking about the sorrows. The labor pains upon a woman. So will it be. And it will silence the scoffers. They will all know a sign of the second coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. The birthing pains. He's doing it out of mercy. He will do this out of love. And the church bells will ring. You'll see people—remember 9/11, how they all ran to church. It was the way to Charlie Kirk. They ran to church. But when you see these signs, they will run. But what will they get when these signs come? You must stay filled, for they're coming in hot. You must stay filled, my harvesters, for the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. For you must stay filled. For they're coming within a day. From shore to shore, they're coming in. I see Hollywood. I see deep blue states. I see the scoffers even in the red states. You'll see scoffers and mockers. 'Where is the coming of the Lord?' But this is his mercy and his grace. One last push. One last call. It's going to shake the world. Play it one more time. Repeat it again. I can hear it again. I heard God's voice. He said, 'I'm making a sign. This is a sign according to the second chapter of Acts where the Apostle Peter, upon the giving of the Holy Spirit, the baptism of the Holy Spirit, said there'll be signs in the skies.' He said, 'This is one of the signs of the end time because the world is not ready for the second coming of my son.' He said, "My church is not ready for the coming of my son." He said, "The Jews with whom I've had the covenant for thousands of years, they're not ready for the second coming of my son." He said, "The nations of the earth are not ready for the second coming of my son." And then I heard God's voice. He said, "I'm making a sign." This is a sign according to the second. He's going to make a sign. It's so loud in me, son. You hear me, babe? I hear it so loud. There's a major event about to take place. Fearful sights that you will see that will bring you to your knee.
